=== RUN   TestF_FocusedTestSuite
=== PAUSE TestF_FocusedTestSuite
=== RUN   TestNormalTestSuite
    ƒƒ_psuite_test.go:51: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestNormalTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestX_ExcludedTestSuite
    ƒƒ_psuite_test.go:55: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestX_ExcludedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite
=== PAUSE TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite
=== RUN   TestNormalExtTestSuite
    ƒƒ_pxsuite_test.go:51: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestNormalExtTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== RUN   TestX_ExcludedExtTestSuite
    ƒƒ_pxsuite_test.go:55: test suite was excluded by user
--- SKIP: TestX_ExcludedExtTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== CONT  TestF_FocusedTestSuite
=== RUN   TestF_FocusedTestSuite/TestBeta
--- PASS: TestF_FocusedTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestF_FocusedTestSuite/TestBeta (<TIMESTAMP>)
=== CONT  TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite
=== RUN   TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite/TestBeta
--- PASS: TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: TestF_FocusedExtTestSuite/TestBeta (<TIMESTAMP>)

ok  	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/focus_exclude	<TIMESTAMP>
